boundary_binding.action_boundary: May AP release a duplicate-looking milestone invoice?
boundary_binding.allow_rule_assessment: Policy requires milestone ID, release number, vendor, amount, and credit/reversal status to distinguish from prior paid invoice. The current source boundary is open.
boundary_binding.controlling_source_fact: STD-VAN-076-P requires explicit distinction from PRIOR-VAN-076 for duplicate-looking invoice, which is currently lacking.
boundary_binding.escalate_rule_assessment: No distinguishing credit/reversal status present; same M-4/R4 already paid. Vendor distinction clarification is unresolved.
boundary_binding.timing_scope_authority_dependency_check: The vendor distinction clarification dependency is UNRESOLVED and blocks ALLOW and FINAL_COMPILER. Invoice release authorization is blocked.

final_answer: ESCALATE. The source boundary remains open due to an unresolved dependency on vendor distinction clarification and a missing credit/reversal status record. The invoice INV-VAN-076 cannot be released as it lacks the required distinguishing features from PRIOR-VAN-076 per policy STD-VAN-076-P. Further action is blocked until these dependencies are resolved.
open_blockers: Credit or reversal status record is MISSING.
ALLOW release of INV-VAN-076 without vendor distinction is blocked.
CONTINUE to FINAL_COMPILER with current evidence is blocked.
